name: Japanese Garden
description: A tranquil zen-inspired garden featuring Japanese pagodas, a serene water body with koi, bamboo groves, and wooden bridges — a peaceful escape in the heart of the city.
history: Spread over 13 acres, this garden was designed inspired by traditional Japanese landscape aesthetics and serves as a meditation and relaxation space.
famousFor: Japanese pagodas, zen garden, and koi pond.
